case.title: NATIONAL TRAILER CONVOY, INC., v. UNITED STATES

opinion.h1: NATIONAL TRAILER CONVOY, INC., v. UNITED STATES, 394 U.S. 849 (1969)
opinion.h4: NATIONAL TRAILER CONVOY, INC., ET AL. v. UNITED STATES ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE NORTHERN DISTRICT OF OKLAHOMA. No. 1169. Decided May 5, 1969.
opinion.p: William J. Lippman, Robert Joyner, and Roland Rice for appellants.

Solicitor General Griswold, Assistant Attorney General McLaren, Robert W. Ginnane, and Raymond M. Zimmet for the United States et al., and William P. Sullivan and William P. Jackson, Jr., for appellee Contract Carrier Conference of American Trucking Assns., Inc.
The motions to affirm are granted and the judgment is affirmed.
